name: Visual Editor
description: Live website preview with direct text and image editing controls.

name: Products Manager
description: Manage all 10 product records from one screen.

name: Discount System
description: Date-based percentage discounts with coming-soon, live, and expiry states.

name: Gallery Manager
description: Multi-image upload, compression, captioning, reordering, and deletion.

name: Blog System
description: Write or import articles, generate SEO metadata, and publish or unpublish.

name: Testimonials Pipeline
description: Collect public reviews, queue them, and approve or reject before publication.

name: Promotions Banner
description: Seasonal banner uploads, scheduling, animation controls, and rotation.

name: Media Library
description: Central storage for images and documents with usage tracking.

name: SEO Manager
description: Page-level title, meta description, and OG image controls.

name: Analytics Dashboard
description: Views, product clicks, article reads, CTA events, and traffic sources.

name: Invoice Generator
description: VAT-aware branded PDF invoices with WhatsApp and email handoff.

name: Warranty Generator
description: Invoice-linked warranty certificate PDFs with unique certificate numbers.

name: Records System
description: Invoices, warranties, and clients with filters, search, and CSV export.

name: Sales Dashboard
description: Revenue trends, service popularity, film popularity, and outstanding balances.
